leanLife.desc:
An IoT system that turns an existing refrigerator smart — managing food inventory, recommending meals, and tracking nutrition.
Conceived and presented at Shidojin Jr. Camp; started prototype development and applied to Mitou Junior.

mayulink.desc: A MaaS platform that IoT-enables MAYU, an electric bus running in Kiryu City — tracking operations, auto-playing location-based ads, and more

aiVtuber.desc: A GPT-4-based AI VTuber. An AI VTuber is a virtual YouTuber powered by AI. Reads YouTube comments and responds with voice

canpass.desc: A note-sharing app for university students

miraizuna.desc: A next-generation digital infrastructure platform weaving human bonds and the future of cities

vision.s1Title: A Blueprint for Civilization — Why We Dream of Stars
vision.s1p1:
My vision is to build, step by step with reality, the mechanisms by which humanity does not perish, develops without limit, and eventually advances toward a galactic civilization.
This path is not a single technology or venture, but a multi-generational master plan where intelligence, institutions, energy, space transport, and multi-planetary society overlap.
On this page, I present that whole picture phase by phase.
vision.s1quote: Rooted on Earth, making the solar system an economic zone, and keeping the interstellar horizon in sight. — I leave the blueprint for that here.
vision.s2p1: Star Dream Project is the umbrella initiative that breaks the grand vision above into units executable now and implements it as a civilization OS that continues to be updated across generations. "Star" signals that the horizon is not wealth confined to Earth but expressive potential at interstellar scale; "Dream" signals that realization is treated not as fixed prophecy but as a blueprint rewritten together with reality.
vision.s2item1: Purpose — Define a civilizational skeleton that maximizes survival probability and creativity without depending on a single planet, single civilizational style, or single intelligence — and connect it to later-phase physical infrastructure (fusion, skyhook, mass driver) and final-phase institutions, economy, and super-intelligence.
vision.s2item2: Intelligence Entity — An intellectual foundation that inherits planning, memory, reasoning, and execution beyond an individual lifespan. By weaving AI agents, distributed consensus, documented blueprints, and collaborative networks, it forms decision and learning loops without single points of failure. The goal is a world where intelligence functions as the nervous system of civilization rather than humans operating solar-system infrastructure directly.
vision.s2item3: What Phase 1 builds — Articulation and validation of the concept, prototypes of the Intelligence Entity, and formation of the technical capability, organization, and capital required for execution. Ground-based work is positioned not as the end goal but as fuel and brain handed to Phase 2 space infrastructure and Phase 3 multi-planetary civilization. Star Dream Project is the mothership of this portfolio vision; all phases branch from it and feed back into it.
vision.s2p2: Outcomes of Phase 1 connect directly to the cosmic physical infrastructure in the next chapter, and to the solar system economic zone, galactic civilization, and black hole computer in the final chapters.
vision.s3Title: Phase 2: Arteries of Space — Fusion, Skyhook, Mass Driver
vision.s3p1: In Phase 2, we move beyond rocket-centric space development and build space transport and energy foundations that are massive, low-cost, and continuously operating. This is civilization's "arterial system," determining the flow of matter, energy, and people to the Moon, Mars, and asteroid belt.
vision.s3fusion:
Fusion, long humanity's dream, is finally entering the realm of feasibility. Beyond Earth's energy and environmental challenges, fusion is decisive for removing bottlenecks in AI compute, space manufacturing, and planetary engineering.

Deuterium–helium-3 (D–He3) fusion in particular suppresses neutron generation and excels in high energy density and suitability for space use. Combined with helium-3 mining believed abundant on the Moon, we form independent energy outposts on the Moon, in orbit, and in the asteroid belt — the heart of the solar system economic zone's power, propulsion, and manufacturing base.
vision.s3skyhook:
A skyhook is orbital tether transport infrastructure — a precursor to the space elevator. Payloads are handed off to a cable in low Earth orbit; centrifugal effects and control of tether rotation and vibration enable mass transport between Earth and orbit that chemical rockets alone struggle to achieve.

A skyhook is not merely a cost reducer. It is the entry point of the solar system supply chain linking orbital stations, lunar bases, and asteroid mining outposts — a prerequisite for Phase 3 multi-planetary civilization. Together with reusable spacecraft and orbital assembly, we phase out rocket dependency.
vision.s3massDriver:
A mass driver electromagnetically accelerates payloads into orbit. Mass drivers built on the Moon or asteroids enable bulk transport without consuming propellant from local resources, becoming part of a logistics network connected to skyhook nodes and fusion outposts.

Orbital tethers (skyhooks) handle "ascent from Earth," mass drivers handle "launch from planetary surfaces," fusion supplies energy — only when all three align does material circulation within the solar system close economically.
vision.s4Title: Phase 3: Multi-Planetary Civilization and the Solar System Economic Zone
vision.s4p1: After physical infrastructure is in place, the aim is Martian independence, construction of the solar system economic zone, and a survival architecture so humanity is not destroyed by a single catastrophe, single polity, or single planet.
vision.s4item1: Martian independence — Mars is designed not as Earth's colony but as the seed of a civilization with autonomous law, economy, energy, defense, and culture. Its relationship with Earth is a union of peer nodes, not domination — redundancy so neither side's collapse ends everything.
vision.s4item2: Solar system economic zone — Connect outposts on Earth, the Moon, Mars, and the asteroid belt through networks of matter, energy, data, and trust. Supply a substantial share of civilization's energy and resources from off-Earth sources and lay institutional foundations for ownership, contracts, and incentives at solar system scale.
vision.s4item3: Mechanisms to survive and develop without limit — Against planetary-scale risks (impacts, climate, war, pandemics, runaway AI, rigid centralization), combine geographic, political, and technical decentralization with intelligence that learns across generations (Star Dream / Intelligence Entity). Replace the ceiling of development with usable energy and expressive potential across the solar system, not Earth's resources or population alone.
vision.s4item4: Connection to galactic civilization — The solar system economic zone is not the endpoint but the outpost of galactic civilization continuing toward interstellar probes, communication, and autonomous bases. The goal is not to realize everything in the near future but to build footing the next generation will call "obvious," starting now.
vision.s4p2: Beyond Phase 3 lies a horizon where the limits of physics and the limits of information converge. The final chapter toward that horizon is super-intelligence based on black hole information engineering.
vision.s5Title: Phase 4 and Beyond: Black Hole Information Engineering and Supreme Cosmic Intelligence
vision.s5p1: Beyond galactic civilization, I see a horizon opened by Black Hole Information Engineering (BHIE). Black holes are not mere destroyers; under the holographic principle, information is encoded on the event horizon as an ultimate information-processing body. Quantum scrambling inside is increasingly understood as one of the fastest forms of information mixing and computation in the universe.
vision.s5p2:
On this theoretical framework, I envision a black hole computer. Through Hawking radiation, AdS/CFT correspondence, and quantum error correction, design and use black holes as cosmic-scale computational resources, connecting stellar-system intelligence to the strongest intelligence in the cosmos. This will not be completed in the coming decades. Yet as the farthest point of a blueprint Star Dream Project updates across generations, articulating it now — and orienting research, institutions, and infrastructure toward it — has meaning.

That humanity does not perish and develops without limit — the next chapter not yet written lies here, not at the end of the journey.
vision.s6p1:
This vision is not fixed prophecy. It is a blueprint continuously updated with real technology, capital, collaborators, and world conditions. What I cannot do now, the next me or the next generation may achieve.

Precisely because it is immensely difficult, grand, and important, it is worth dedicating one's life to. From Star Dream Project through fusion, skyhook, and mass driver, Martian independence and the solar system economic zone, to the black hole computer — I believe in this path, keep learning, and keep building.
